events.title: Iran Strikes Prince Sultan Air Base
events.desc: Iranian drones and missiles struck Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia, destroying an E-3 Sentry and damaging multiple KC-135 tankers. This marks a significant escalation in Iran's counterair campaign against U.S. operations in the region.
events.location: Prince Sultan Air Base, Saudi Arabia

events.title: Israeli Strikes Intensify in Lebanon
events.desc: Israel has intensively bombed parts of Lebanon and launched an expanded ground invasion in the south following attacks attributed to Hezbollah, escalating the conflict's regional impact.

events.title: Scale of Beirut Destruction Revealed After Israeli Strikes
events.desc: The damage from devastating Israeli strikes on Beirut is becoming apparent, highlighting the significant impact on civilian areas.

events.title: Sidon Residents Survey Damage After Israeli Strikes
events.desc: Residents in Sidon are assessing the destruction following Israeli strikes that reportedly flattened a religious complex.

events.title: Hezbollah Lawmaker Rejects Direct Negotiations with Israel
events.desc: A Hezbollah lawmaker stated the group rejects direct negotiations with Israel, emphasizing that any steps require a ceasefire as a precondition, highlighting the complex dynamics beyond the US-Iran truce.

events.title: Dozens of States Condemn Attacks on UN Peacekeepers in Lebanon
events.desc: Sixty-three countries and the EU issued a joint statement condemning aggressive behavior towards UN peacekeepers in Lebanon, following the deaths of three Indonesian soldiers and expressing concern over the humanitarian situation.

events.title: Lebanon Seeks Temporary Ceasefire for Broader Talks with Israel
events.desc: A senior Lebanese official indicated that Lebanon is advocating for a temporary ceasefire to facilitate broader talks with Israel, separate from the US-Iran truce but with US mediation.

events.title: Israel to Hold Direct Talks with Lebanon
events.desc: Prime Minister Netanyahu announced Israel's intention to begin direct peace talks with Lebanon, focusing on Hezbollah's disarmament and establishing peaceful relations.

events.title: Israeli Strikes in Lebanon 'Grave Violation' of Ceasefire
events.desc: Iran's deputy foreign minister described recent Israeli strikes in Lebanon as a "grave violation" of the ceasefire and stated the US must choose between war and peace.

events.title: 182 Killed Across Lebanon in Wave of Israeli Strikes
events.desc: A large wave of Israeli strikes across Lebanon, including Beirut's southern suburbs and the eastern Bekaa Valley, resulted in at least 182 fatalities hours after a US-Iran ceasefire was announced.

events.title: US Republicans Block Bid to End Trump Iran War Powers
events.desc: House of Representatives Republicans blocked a Democratic effort to end U.S. attacks on Iran, preventing attempts to rein in President Trump's war powers.

events.title: Iran Says 'Dumb' for US to Let Netanyahu Kill Diplomacy
events.desc: Iran's Abbas Araghchi warned of repercussions if Israel's attacks on Lebanon continue, implying that allowing such actions would be detrimental to diplomatic efforts, in response to comments by JD Vance.

events.title: UN Envoy Visits Bombed Sites in Tehran
events.desc: Jean Arnault, the UN Secretary-General's personal envoy, met with Iran's Deputy Foreign Minister and visited civilian sites damaged in recent air strikes, including a university and an apartment block.

events.title: US Scattering Mines Over Iranian Village
events.desc: Evidence suggests the US deployed Gator Scatterable Mine systems over the village of Kafari in southern Iran, resulting in casualties according to Iranian media reports. Experts identified the munitions as US-made.

events.title: Two Waves of Bombing at Iran School Revealed in New Videos
events.desc: Newly verified videos show multiple missiles hitting an IRGC compound and an adjacent school in Minab, Iran, in late February, providing further details on the two waves of strikes.

events.title: Iran Claims UAE Downplayed Drone Strikes
events.desc: Bellingcat identified incidents where UAE authorities allegedly downplayed damage and mischaracterized interceptions related to Iranian drone strikes on the country, suggesting a narrative control effort.

events.title: Hungarian Government Passwords Exposed Online
events.desc: Approximately 800 Hungarian government email addresses and passwords have been leaked online, affecting 12 out of 13 ministries and potentially compromising sensitive information.
